<!--
Title: `type(scope): short description`, e.g. `fix(chrome): dim unfocused sidebar sessions`.
type is a conventional-commit type (feat, fix, perf, style, ...); scope is the touched
area (chrome, render, mux, ditch, app, ...). Keep it lowercase and imperative/descriptive,
not a comma-separated list of every change on the branch.
-->

## What

<!-- One paragraph or short bullet list: what changed and why. Link the files/modules touched. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Bulleted, checkable statements of expected behavior. What should hold true after this merges? -->

## Testing

<!-- Commands run (fmt/clippy/test/build) and their results. Note anything verified manually
     (with how) versus not verified, and why (e.g. no headless GPU, platform-specific path). -->
